=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/structuralTypeToSchema_symbolNames.ts ---
// refactor: 14:18-14:26
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

type User = {
  id: number
  name: string
}

interface Todo {
  id: number
  description: string
}

export interface pipe(AppState) {
  users: User
  tasks: Array<[Todo, User]>
}


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Generate Effect.Schema from type" ===

--- file:///.src/structuralTypeToSchema_symbolNames.ts ---
// refactor: 14:18-14:26
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

type User = {
  id: number
  name: string
}

interface Todo {
  id: number
  description: string
}

export const AppState = Schema.Struct({
    users: User,
    tasks: Schema.Array(Schema.Tuple([Todo, User]))
});

export interface AppState {
  users: User
  tasks: Array<[Todo, User]>
}


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Generate Schema.Class from type" ===

--- file:///.src/structuralTypeToSchema_symbolNames.ts ---
// refactor: 14:18-14:26
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

type User = {
  id: number
  name: string
}

interface Todo {
  id: number
  description: string
}

export class AppState extends Schema.Class<AppState>("AppState")({
    users: User,
    tasks: Schema.Array(Schema.Tuple([Todo, User]))
}) {}

export interface AppState {
  users: User
  tasks: Array<[Todo, User]>
}


=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Refactor to Schema (Recursive Structural)" ===

--- file:///.src/structuralTypeToSchema_symbolNames.ts ---
// refactor: 14:18-14:26
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

type User = {
  id: number
  name: string
}

interface Todo {
  id: number
  description: string
}

export class AppState extends Schema.Class<AppState>("AppState")({
    users: User,
    tasks: Schema.mutable(Schema.Array(Schema.Tuple([Todo, User])))
}) {}

class Todo extends Schema.Class<Todo>("Todo")({
    id: Schema.Number,
    description: Schema.String
}) {}

class User extends Schema.Class<User>("User")({
    id: Schema.Number,
    name: Schema.String
}) {}

export interface AppState {
  users: User
  tasks: Array<[Todo, User]>
}
